title: Qlik Sense Application
description: A Qlik Sense application (app) containing data models, visualizations, sheets, stories, and bookmarks. Apps are the primary container for analytics content in Qlik Sense Enterprise.

id.description: Unique identifier (GUID) assigned by the repository

createdDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the app was created

modifiedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the app was last modified. Used for optimistic concurrency control.

modifiedByUserName.description: Username of the user who last modified the app

appId.description: Internal application identifier used by the engine

description.description: Description of the application's purpose and content

publishTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the app was published to a stream

published.description: Whether the app is currently published to a stream

stream.description: The stream the app is published to, if any

fileSize.description: Size of the application QVF file in bytes

lastReloadTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last successful data reload

thumbnail.description: Relative path to the application thumbnail image

savedInProductVersion.description: Qlik Sense product version the app was last saved in

migrationHash.description: Hash indicating the migration state of the app

owner.description: The user who owns the application

tags.description: Tags applied to the application for categorization

customProperties.description: Custom property values assigned to the application

privileges.description: List of privileges the current user has on this app

schemaPath.description: Schema path identifying the entity type in the QRS
